name: advanced-vision
description: Computer-use capability layer for AI systems - screenshots, Linux window focus, mouse/keyboard control, OCR-backed proposals, and verification

tools.name: screenshot_full
tools.description: Capture full desktop screenshot and save as artifact

tools.name: screenshot_active_window
tools.description: Capture active window screenshot (falls back to full screen if window detection fails)

tools.name: move_mouse
tools.description: Move mouse cursor to specified coordinates

parameters.dry_run: boolean - If true, don't actually move (default: false)
boolean - If true, don't actually click (default: false)

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Type text at current cursor position

parameters.dry_run: boolean - If true, don't actually type (default: false)

tools.name: press_keys
tools.description: Press keyboard keys or key combinations

parameters.keys: array of strings - Keys to press (e.g., ['ctrl', 'c'] for copy)
parameters.dry_run: boolean - If true, don't actually press (default: false)
boolean - If true, don't actually scroll (default: false)

tools.name: verify_screen_change
tools.description: Compare screenshots to detect visual changes

parameters.current_screenshot_path: string or number - Path to after screenshot, or threshold (optional)

returns.changed: boolean - True if screen changed significantly

tools.name: list_windows
tools.description: List visible top-level windows with best-effort Linux metadata

returns.windows: array - Window info with window_id, title, app_name, is_active

tools.name: focus_window
tools.description: Focus the best-matching visible window by title and optional app name

parameters.title_query: string - Title fragment to match against visible windows
parameters.app_name: string - Optional app/process hint like chrome
parameters.dry_run: boolean - If true, don't execute (default: false)

tools.name: analyze_screenshot
tools.description: Analyze a screenshot and propose the safest likely action using OCR, detector, and browser heuristics

parameters.task: string - Human task such as 'Click Publish' or 'Click the address bar'

returns.x: integer - Proposed x coordinate when available
returns.y: integer - Proposed y coordinate when available
returns.bbox: array - Bounding box [x1, y1, x2, y2] when available
returns.matched_text: string - OCR or detector match when available

system_requirements.linux: X11 display server preferred; xdotool improves Linux window focus and metadata
system_requirements.optional: local YOLO weights at yolov8n.pt improve detector fallback
